_comment: Editable model catalog for `eyes.py recommend`. Pick a VLM by GPU memory + architecture + task.
Memory is ESTIMATED as params_b * bytes_per_param[dtype] + task KV/activation overhead; treat as a
rough fit guide, not a guarantee. Add/adjust rows freely - this is data, not code. Sizes/repos drift;
verify a chosen model's exact repo id + license before serving.
tasks scores: 0..1 suitability per task; a task absent from a model's map scores 0.15 (can attempt).
Set a task to 0 to exclude the model from that task entirely.

tasks.ui-stills: static screenshots of web/native/mobile UIs - OCR, layout, element grounding
tasks.ui-video: short UI screen recordings / multi-step flows - temporal but still GUI
tasks.physical-video: real-world / camera / robotics video - space-time-physics reasoning

models.name: UI-TARS-1.5-7B
models.note: end-to-end GUI agent; action-capable (overkill for pure 'eyes')

models.name: Cosmos3-Nano (reasoner tower)
models.note: omni; serve via vllm/vllm-omni:cosmos3-aarch64, arch Cosmos3ForConditionalGeneration; correct OCR + native video

models.name: Nemotron-Nano-12B-v2-VL
models.note: NVFP4; fast stills+video; commercial license; occasional OCR digit slip; needs --trust-remote-code --enforce-eager

models.name: Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct
models.note: MoE: ~3B active (fast) but full weights must fit in memory

models.name: Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct
models.note: top dense UI VLM in this tier
